mapper.select: select id, user_name as userName, name, description, embed_model_id as embedModelId, created_at as createdAt, updated_at as updatedAt from zephyr_knowledge_base where user_name = #{userName} order by created_at desc
select id, user_name as userName, name, description, embed_model_id as embedModelId, created_at as createdAt, updated_at as updatedAt from zephyr_knowledge_base where id = #{id}

select id, user_name as userName, name, description, embed_model_id as embedModelId, created_at as createdAt, updated_at as updatedAt from zephyr_knowledge_base where id in
#{item}
mapper.insert: insert into zephyr_knowledge_base (id, user_name, name, description, embed_model_id, created_at, updated_at) values (#{id}, #{userName}, #{name}, #{description}, #{embedModelId}, #{createdAt}, #{updatedAt})
mapper.select: select id, kb_id as kbId, file_name as fileName, file_type as fileType, file_size as fileSize, content, source_type as sourceType, chunk_count as chunkCount, status, error_msg as errorMsg, created_at as createdAt, updated_at as updatedAt from zephyr_knowledge_doc where kb_id = #{kbId} order by created_at desc

select id, kb_id as kbId, file_name as fileName, file_type as fileType, file_size as fileSize, content, source_type as sourceType, chunk_count as chunkCount, status, error_msg as errorMsg, created_at as createdAt, updated_at as updatedAt from zephyr_knowledge_doc where id = #{id}
mapper.insert: insert into zephyr_knowledge_doc (id, kb_id, file_name, file_type, file_size, content, source_type, chunk_count, status, error_msg, created_at) values (#{id}, #{kbId}, #{fileName}, #{fileType}, #{fileSize}, #{content}, #{sourceType}, #{chunkCount}, #{status}, #{errorMsg}, #{createdAt})
mapper.select: select kb_id from zephyr_conversation_kb where conversation_id = #{conversationId}
